inputs.label: Pressure (mmHg)
inputs.businessContext: Measured pressure in millimeters of mercury, standard atmosphere = 760 mmHg

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured pressure in millimeters of mercury, standard atmosphere = 760 mmHg
businessContext_i18n.tr: Milimetre cıva cinsinden ölçülen basınç, standart atmosfer = 760 mmHg
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessener Druck in Millimeter Quecksilbersäule, Standardatmosphäre = 760 mmHg
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression mesurée en millimètres de mercure, atmosphère standard = 760 mmHg
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión medida en milímetros de mercurio, atmósfera estándar = 760 mmHg

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion factor from mmHg to psi (1 mmHg = 0.0193368 psi). Adjust for custom calibrations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard conversion factor from mmHg to psi (1 mmHg = 0.0193368 psi). Adjust for custom calibrations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: mmHg'den psi'ye standart dönüşüm faktörü (1 mmHg = 0,0193368 psi). Özel kalibrasyonlar için ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardumrechnungsfaktor von mmHg in psi (1 mmHg = 0,0193368 psi). Für individuelle Kalibrierungen anpassen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de conversion standard de mmHg en psi (1 mmHg = 0,0193368 psi). Ajuster pour les étalonnages personnalisés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de conversión estándar de mmHg a psi (1 mmHg = 0.0193368 psi). Ajuste para calibraciones personalizadas.

inputs.label: Offset
inputs.businessContext: Calibration offset in psi to correct systematic measurement error.

businessContext_i18n.en: Calibration offset in psi to correct systematic measurement error.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sistematik ölçüm hatasını düzeltmek için psi cinsinden kalibrasyon ofseti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kalibrierungsversatz in psi zur Korrektur systematischer Messfehler.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Décalage d'étalonnage en psi pour corriger l'erreur de mesure systématique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Desplazamiento de calibración en psi para corregir el error sistemático de medición.

inputs.label: Output Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the rounded output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the rounded output.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yuvarlanmış çıktı için ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für das gerundete Ergebnis.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour le résultat arrondi.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para la salida redondeada.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
